title: Lurking in the Dark
description: Survive and thrive in not only this world, but the other dimensions while MANY monsters hunt you down, some intend on scaring you, others intend on kill you. Good Luck out there.
body:
## [Warning: This pack isn't greatly optimized]
_PST, i never told you this, but i maybe, might, be releasing a Fabric Port of LitD_
![Lurking in the DARK | The Terrifying Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d12d48b7f53cf7d75c9fab4691ff16d561c72694.png)
_Survive and thrive in not only this world, but the other dimensions while **MANY** monsters hunt you down, some intend on scaring you, others intend on kill you. Good Luck out there._
## If it wasnt obvious enough, Jumpscare Warning
Classic Horrors such as Herobrine, The Man from the Fog, and the Dweller Series are just a few of what you shall come across in this dark, fearfull world.
